package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinHandlerStoresContextInStructField() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_stores_context_in_struct_field"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Code that saves `*gin.Context` onto long-lived structs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
